scene_image_prompts.image_prompt: Kael standing on a broken floating bridge overlooking a massive glowing city in the clouds, energy storms forming in the distance, dark vampire RPG style, anime manga hybrid, high contrast lighting, gothic atmosphere, detailed textures, cinematic composition, dramatic shadows, rich blacks, deep reds, muted blues, semi-realistic anime proportions, wide cinematic shot, low angle, depth of field
scene_image_prompts.style_consistency_reference: Keep Kael's appearance, color palette, and city architecture identical across scenes.

consistency_rules: Kael always has pale skin, tied-back long black hair, glowing blue eyes, and dark leather armor with gold engravings.
The world always uses deep blue fog, red shadow accents, and gold machine light.
City architecture always stays cathedral-like, broken, and machine-made.
Do not change outfits unless the story explicitly says so.
Do not change art style, lighting, or palette between scenes.
Every scene must keep the same dark vampire RPG anime manga hybrid look.
